name: Amazoness Hall
name_jp: アマゾネス<ruby lang="jp"><rb>拝</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>謁</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>間</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When this card is activated: You can take 1 "Amazoness" monster from your GY or your face-up Extra Deck, and either add it to your hand or (if it is a Pendulum Monster) place it in your Pendulum Zone. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field while you control an "Amazoness" Monster Card (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of those opponent's monsters; gain LP equal to its ATK. You can only use this effect of "Amazoness Hall" once per turn.
eff: When this card is activated: You can take 1 "Amazoness" monster from your GY or your face-up Extra Deck, and either add it to your hand or (if it is a Pendulum Monster) place it in your Pendulum Zone. If a monster(s) is Special Summoned to your opponent's field while you control an "Amazoness" Monster Card (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of those opponent's monsters; gain LP equal to its ATK. You can only use this effect of "Amazoness Hall" once per turn.

action: Adds from Extra Deck to hand
Places from Graveyard to Pendulum Zone
Places from Extra Deck to Pendulum Zone
